name: Orange Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Freshly squeezed orange juice, warmed (about 120 Degrees)
1/2 cup Lowfat soy milk at room temperature
1/8 teaspoon Orange oil or 1 Tablespoon Grated orange rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Set your waffle iron on a low setting. If your waffle iron doesn't have a temperature setting, check to see if the waffles are done when the waffle maker opens easily.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm orange juice and let sit for 10 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients and stir well for several minutes.
4. Let batter rest, covered, in a warm spot for 30 minutes.
5. Heat waffle iron and pour in the appropriate amount of batter for your specific model.
6. Spread batter to the edges of the waffle iron.
7. Close and cook until gently browned.
Total Calories Per Serving: 409 Fat: 7 grams
